title: TAS
description: Topology Agnostic Structure (TAS) v2 — a complete power converter design as four sections: inputs (the spec the converter must satisfy), topology (how it is built, as a tree of stages), outputs (how it performs), simulation (optional SPICE artefacts used to produce the outputs).

inputs.description: Design specification + operating points the converter must satisfy.

outputs.description: Computed/measured results: per-design metrics plus per-operating-point losses, stresses, and per-stage breakdowns.

simulation.description: Global SPICE artefacts (model definitions, simulation commands). Per-component overrides live on the component itself, not here.
